name: efounders-design
description: eFounders design toolbox — explore directions, prototype and review (design-skills), plus the design-system skills: audit, bootstrap, Figma sync (design-system).

plugins.name: design-skills
plugins.description: da-exploration, prototype, product-review — design-system-agnostic skills that work against any repo's real design system.

plugins.name: design-system
plugins.description: The @efounders design-system toolbox: ds-audit (assess a project), ds-bootstrap (set up its DS), ds-figma (sync Figma from the code).
